title: pilosella guthnikiana subsp. rubrisabina
intro: Pilosella guthnikiana subsp. rubrisabina, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella guthnikiana plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, Pilosella guthnikiana subsp. rubrisabina has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella guthnikiana subsp. rubrisabina is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
